mapper.select: SELECT n.notice_id AS noticeId, u.user_id AS adminId, u.name AS adminName, n.title, n.content, n.notice_id AS noticeId, n.target_role_id AS targetRoleId, r.role_name AS roleName, DATE_FORMAT(n.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM (SELECT * FROM notice WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}) n INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = n.target_role_id INNER JOIN user u ON n.admin_id = u.user_id

SELECT ab.album_id AS albumId, ab.lecture_id AS lectureId, sb.name AS subjectName, ab.title AS title, ab.description, DATE_FORMAT(ab.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt, ap.photo_id AS photoId, ap.file_path AS filePath FROM album ab LEFT OUTER JOIN album_photo ap ON ab.album_id = ap.album_id LEFT OUTER JOIN lecture lt ON lt.lecture_id = ab.lecture_id LEFT OUTER JOIN subject sb ON sb.subject_id = lt.subject_id

SELECT ab.album_id AS albumId, ab.lecture_id AS lectureId, sb.name AS subjectName, ab.title AS title, ab.description, DATE_FORMAT(ab.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM (SELECT * FROM album WHERE album_id = #{albumId}) ab INNER JOIN lecture lt ON lt.lecture_id = ab.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON sb.subject_id = lt.subject_id
SELECT photo_id AS photoId, album_id AS albumId, file_path AS filePath FROM album_photo WHERE album_id = #{albumId};
SELECT qna_id AS qnaId, parent_id AS parentId, admin_id AS adminId, question, answer, created_at AS createdAt, answered_at AS answeredAt FROM qna;
SELECT qna_id AS qnaId, parent_id AS parentId, admin_id AS adminId, question, answer, created_at AS createdAt, answered_at AS answeredAt FROM qna WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId};
SELECT role_id AS roleId, role_name AS roleName FROM role ORDER BY role_id

SELECT sb.name AS subjectName, u.name AS teacherName, cr.name AS classroomName, cr.location AS location, lt.lecture_id AS lectureId, DATE_FORMAT(lt.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, DATE_FORMAT(lt.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, lt.day_of_week AS 'dayOfWeek', lt.start_date AS startDate, lt.end_date AS endDate FROM (SELECT * FROM lecture WHERE end_date >= CURDATE() )lt INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom cr ON lt.classroom_id = cr.classroom_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user u ON ta.teacher_id = u.user_id

SELECT vc.vehicle_id AS vehicleId, vc.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, dr.user_id AS driverId, vc.capacity, IFNULL(dr.name,'') AS driverName, IFNULL(dr.phone,'') AS phone, IFNULL(va.location,'') AS location FROM vehicle vc LEFT OUTER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON va.vehicle_id = vc.vehicle_id LEFT OUTER JOIN user dr ON dr.user_id = va.driver_id;
SELECT vehicle_id AS vehicleId, vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, capacity FROM vehicle WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId};

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, u.email, u.phone, u.address, u.birth FROM user u INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = u.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT user_id AS userId, NAME AS userName, phone, email FROM user WHERE role_id = 5;

SELECT st.user_id AS userId, st.name AS userName, st.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, st.email, st.phone, st.address, st.birth FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{parentId}) pa INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON pa.user_id = sp.parent_id INNER JOIN user st ON sp.student_id = st.user_id INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = st.role_id

SELECT pa.user_id AS userId, pa.name AS userName, pa.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, pa.email, pa.phone, pa.address, pa.birth FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{studentId}) st INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON st.user_id = sp.student_id INNER JOIN user pa ON sp.parent_id = pa.user_id INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = pa.role_id

SELECT v.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, v.capacity, l.end_time AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek FROM vehicle v INNER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON v.vehicle_id = va.vehicle_id INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = va.driver_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = va.lecture_id WHERE u.user_id = #{driverId}
SELECT history_id AS historyId, teacher_id AS teacherId, last_education AS lastEducation, personal_history AS personalHistory FROM teacher_history WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT assignment_id AS assignmentId, lecture_id AS lectureId, vehicle_id AS vehicleId, driver_id AS driverId, location FROM vehicle_assignment WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO album (lecture_id, title, description, created_at) VALUES (#{lectureId}, #{title}, #{description}, NOW())
